title: A man reported the fall of a big blue UFO in Diamantino-MT [1998]
excerpt: JAN 8th, 1998. In the city of Diamantino, a witness who declined to be identified, reported to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] the fall of an unidentified flying object that happened 40 days before he reported the fact. text_preview: JAN 8th, 1998. In the city of Diamantino, a witness who declined to be identified, reported to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command] the fall of an unidentified flying object that happened 40 days before he reported the fact. According to the witness, the UFO was big, blue and made a big noise when it crashed around 8:30pm. The object flew in a South/North direction before falling. The complementary data from COMDABRA brings the observations made by the military who was contacted regarding the sighting:  “The observer declined to identify himself or provide further details. He informe
summary: Anonymous witness reported a large blue UFO crashing near Diamantino-MT on BR-364 around Nov 1997; reported to COMDABRA in Jan 1998.
